observations.title: 引用行 53-79 は round HEAD advance の退避関数（write-scope violation 退避は 238-282）
observations.rationale: request が「違反内容を退避する quarantine の仕組み」として引用した行は quarantineRoundHeadAdvanceEvidence（round HEAD advance 証拠退避）。write-scope violation の退避は quarantineViolationEvidence（238-282）が担う。両者とも localSidecarDir(slug) に書き出すため quarantine パターンの存在は正確だが、引用関数の説明が若干ずれている。実装者は 238-282 の quarantineViolationEvidence を再利用モデルとして参照すること。

observations.title: pipelineManagedPaths が返す 5 パスは step result ファイルを含まない
observations.rationale: request は pipelineManagedPaths が change folder 配下の pipeline 管理パス集合を定義すると述べるが、同関数が返すのは state.json / events.jsonl / usage.json / bite-evidence-result.md / pr-create-result.md の 5 パスのみ。spec-review-result-NNN.md 等の step result ファイルは含まれない（各 step の writes() で宣言）。reconcile 対象は isJudgeArtifact（*-result-*.md / review-feedback-*.md）または「change folder 配下で protectedCanonPaths 外のすべて」という基準で実装者が定義する必要がある。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, and tasks.md under specrunner/changes/resume-worktree-reconciliation/ for the halt→resume worktree-reconciliation feature.

Design summary:
- New module src/core/resume/reconcile-worktree.ts with a pure classifier isReconcilableArtifact() and an I/O orchestrator reconcileWorktreeArtifacts(). Reconcile runs in ResumeCommand.prepare() after the (unchanged) apply-canon gate, inside the same worktree guard, so it covers default / --from / --apply-canon paths.
- 3-class recovery contract: (1) protected canon → unchanged apply-canon gate; (2) pipeline-managed artifact (under change folder ∧ ¬protectedCanonPaths ∧ ¬pipelineManagedPaths) → quarantine to .specrunner/local/<slug>/ then remove, quarantine failure is fail-closed; (3) non-managed (src/ + the state journal state.json/events.jsonl/usage.json) → untouched. Reuses pipelineManagedPaths as the keep-set to avoid drift and to protect the just-written running-state journal.
- Quarantine-all-then-remove-all (evidence never lost); removal split by tracked state mirrors restoreViolatedPaths; detection is best-effort no-op while quarantine/removal is fail-closed (D7), which also keeps existing apply-canon tests green unchanged.

All 6 acceptance criteria are mapped to tasks (T-05 TC-R1 walks the real findScopedCommitViolations/findWriteScopeViolations halt path; T-05 TC-R2 quarantine-failure fail-closed; T-05 TC-R3 idempotent no-op; T-08 apply-canon unchanged-green; T-03+T-07 docs contract+drift-guard; T-09 typecheck && test). Scope-outs honored (no write-set-check change, no halt-side cleanup, non-managed dirt behavior preserved). No source edits performed — planning only.
